scenes.text:
Micromanagement is not leadership. It
is insecurity disguised as diligence.

When you micromanage, you send a clear message. I do not trust you. That message destroys morale, kills creativity, and drives talent away. The
best leaders hire great people and then get out of their way. They provide direction, resources, and support. Then they trust the process.

Your job is not to control every detail. Your job is to set the vision, remove obstacles, and coach your
team to greatness. If you have to oversee every detail, you hired the wrong people or you are the bottleneck.

Empower people to make decisions. That is
how you scale yourself and your impact.

Are you a leader or a controller?
Be honest. Follow for empowerment leadership.
